datasets.name: 53e02597
queryLines:
SELECT *,
CAST(created_date AS DATE) AS created_date_day
 FROM fins_aml.data_generation.alerts

datasets.name: a0d8b62e
queryLines:
-- Dataset name: kpi_txn_amount
WITH weekly AS (
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', created_date) AS wk,
         SUM(total_amount) AS v
  FROM fins_aml.data_generation.alerts
  WHERE alert_status IN ('assigned','escalated','in_progress','new')
  GROUP BY 1
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT wk, v,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY wk DESC) AS rn
  FROM weekly
)
SELECT
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN v END) AS current_value,
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 2 THEN v END) AS previous_value
FROM ranked;

datasets.name: f89a60dc
queryLines:
-- Dataset: kpi_case_volume
WITH weekly AS (
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', created_date) AS wk,
         COUNT(DISTINCT alert_id) AS v
  FROM fins_aml.data_generation.alerts
  WHERE alert_status IN ('assigned','escalated','in_progress','new')
  GROUP BY 1
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT wk, v, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY wk DESC) AS rn
  FROM weekly
)
SELECT
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN v END) AS current_value,
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 2 THEN v END) AS previous_value
FROM ranked;

datasets.name: bbea6181
queryLines:
-- Dataset: kpi_false_positive_rate
WITH weekly AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', resolution_date) AS wk,
    SUM(CASE WHEN resolution = 'False Positive' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fp_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN resolution IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)         AS resolved_cnt
  FROM fins_aml.data_generation.alerts
  GROUP BY 1
),
rates AS (
  SELECT
    wk,
    TRY_DIVIDE(fp_cnt, NULLIF(resolved_cnt, 0)) AS rate
  FROM weekly
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT wk, rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY wk DESC) AS rn
  FROM rates
)
SELECT
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN rate END) AS current_value,
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 2 THEN rate END) AS previous_value
FROM ranked;

datasets.name: c6065fd9
queryLines:
-- Dataset: kpi_upcoming_deadlines
WITH win AS (
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', CURRENT_DATE) AS curr_start
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
      WHEN due_date >= curr_start
       AND due_date <  curr_start + INTERVAL 7 DAYS
       AND resolution IS NULL
    THEN alert_id END) AS current_value,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
      WHEN due_date >= curr_start - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
       AND due_date <  curr_start
       AND resolution IS NULL
    THEN alert_id END) AS previous_value
  FROM fins_aml.data_generation.alerts
  CROSS JOIN win
)
SELECT current_value, previous_value
FROM agg;

datasets.name: c2ae409e
queryLines:
-- Dataset: kpi_avg_investigation_hours
WITH weekly AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', close_date) AS wk,
    AVG(investigation_time_hours)  AS v
  FROM fins_aml.data_generation.cases
  WHERE close_date IS NOT NULL
    AND investigation_time_hours IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT wk, v, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY wk DESC) AS rn
  FROM weekly
)
SELECT
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN v END) AS current_value,
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 2 THEN v END) AS previous_value
FROM ranked;

datasets.name: 6b6f4386
queryLines:
-- Dataset: kpi_past_due_alerts
WITH win AS (
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', CURRENT_DATE) AS curr_start
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    -- unresolved alerts past due as of start of this week
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
      WHEN due_date < curr_start
       AND resolution IS NULL
    THEN alert_id END) AS current_value,
    -- unresolved alerts past due as of start of last week
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
      WHEN due_date < curr_start - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
       AND resolution IS NULL
    THEN alert_id END) AS previous_value
  FROM fins_aml.data_generation.alerts
  CROSS JOIN win
)
SELECT current_value, previous_value
FROM agg;

datasets.name: 5a7750e3
queryLines:
-- Dataset: inv_time_by_team_case_type
SELECT
  team_name,
  CASE
    WHEN case_type = 'bene'  THEN 'Beneficiary Mismatch'
    WHEN case_type = 'struct' THEN 'Cash Structuring Detection'
    WHEN case_type = 'dorm'  THEN 'Dormant Account Reactivation'
    WHEN case_type = 'geo'   THEN 'High-Risk Geography Transfer'
    WHEN case_type = 'pep'   THEN 'PEP/Sanctions Alert'
    WHEN case_type = 'rapid' THEN 'Rapid Fund Movement'
    WHEN case_type = 'rel'   THEN 'Related Account Movement'
    WHEN case_type = 'round' THEN 'Round Dollar Pattern'
    WHEN case_type = '3pty'  THEN 'Third-Party Deposit Pattern'
    ELSE COALESCE(case_type, '(unknown)')
  END AS case_type_full,
  AVG(investigation_time_hours) AS avg_investigation_time_hours
FROM fins_aml.data_generation.cases
WHERE investigation_time_hours IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY team_name, case_type_full
ORDER BY team_name, case_type_full;

datasets.name: 8b55ffeb
datasets.displayName: Case Outcomes and Average Investigation Times Summary
queryLines:
-- Dataset: cases_disposition_kpi
WITH normalized AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN LOWER(TRIM(disposition)) IN ('no further action','nfa') THEN 'No Further Action'
      WHEN LOWER(TRIM(disposition)) IN ('sar filed','sar')          THEN 'SAR Filed'
      ELSE TRIM(disposition)
    END AS disposition_norm,
    case_id,
    investigation_time_hours
  FROM fins_aml.data_generation.cases
  WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(disposition), '') IS NOT NULL   -- drop NULLs and blanks
),
filtered AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM normalized
  WHERE disposition_norm IN ('No Further Action','SAR Filed')
)
SELECT
  disposition_norm AS disposition,
  COUNT(*)                                         AS cases,
  AVG(investigation_time_hours)                    AS avg_investigation_time_hours
FROM filtered
GROUP BY disposition_norm
ORDER BY CASE disposition_norm
           WHEN 'No Further Action' THEN 1
           WHEN 'SAR Filed'         THEN 2
           ELSE 99
         END;
